 69→
 70→        this.site = site

 79→    private fun navigateToScreen(prepublishingScreen: PrepublishingScreen, bundle: Bundle? = null) {
 80→        // Note: given we know both the HOME, TAGS and ADD_CATEGORY screens have an EditText, we can ask to send the
 81→        // dismissKeyboard signal only when we're not either in one of these nor navigating towards one of these.
 82→        // At this point in code we only know where we want to navigate to, but it's ok since landing on any of these
 83→        // two we'll want the keyboard to stay up if it was already up ;) (i.e. don't dismiss it).
 84→        // For the case where this is not a story and hence there's no EditText in the HOME screen, we're ok too,
 85→        // because there wouldn't have been a keyboard up anyway.
 86→        if (prepublishingScreen == PUBLISH ||
 87→            prepublishingScreen == CATEGORIES

100→        } else {

102→        }
103→    }

109→                navigateToScreen(currentScreen as PrepublishingScreen, bundle)
110→            }
111→
112→            currentScreen != HOME -> {

115→            }
116→

content.text:
Implemented a minimal fix to ensure Pages don’t show the pre-publish nudge modal (and therefore can’t access Categories):

### Changes
- **Skip opening the prepublishing bottom sheet for Pages** when the user taps publish/update/schedule/submit actions, and instead proceed directly with the upload flow (while still respecting the “story save in progress” guard and keeping the app-rating interaction increment for publish/submit).
  - Updated: `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/EditPostActivity.java`

- **Defensive UI fix:** if the prepublishing sheet is ever opened for a Page, it will no longer include the Categories row.
  - Updated: `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/prepublishing/home/PrepublishingHomeViewModel.kt`

These changes prevent the Categories prepublish prompt from appearing for Pages and align behavior with the expectation that Pages should publish without the prepublishing modal.

 30→class PrepublishingViewModel @Inject constructor(private val dispatcher: Dispatcher) : ViewModel() {
 31→    private var isStarted = false
 32→    private lateinit var site: SiteModel
 33→
 34→    private val _navigationTarget = MutableLiveData<Event<PrepublishingNavigationTarget>>()
 35→    val navigationTarget: LiveData<Event<PrepublishingNavigationTarget>> = _navigationTarget
 36→
 37→    private var currentScreen: PrepublishingScreen? = null
 38→
 39→    private val _dismissBottomSheet = MutableLiveData<Event<Unit>>()
 40→    val dismissBottomSheet: LiveData<Event<Unit>> = _dismissBottomSheet
 41→
 42→    private val _dismissKeyboard = MutableLiveData<Event<Unit>>()
 43→    val dismissKeyboard: LiveData<Event<Unit>> = _dismissKeyboard
 44→
 45→    private val _triggerOnSubmitButtonClickedListener = MutableLiveData<Event<PublishPost>>()
 46→    val triggerOnSubmitButtonClickedListener: LiveData<Event<PublishPost>> = _triggerOnSubmitButtonClickedListener
 47→
 48→    private val _triggerOnDeviceBackPressed = MutableLiveData<Event<PrepublishingScreen>>()
 49→    val triggerOnDeviceBackPressed: LiveData<Event<PrepublishingScreen>> = _triggerOnDeviceBackPressed
 50→
 51→    private val _navigateToSharingSettings = MutableLiveData<Event<SiteModel>>()
 52→    val navigateToSharingSettings: LiveData<Event<SiteModel>> = _navigateToSharingSettings
 53→
 54→    init {
 55→        dispatcher.register(this)
 56→    }
 57→
 58→    override fun onCleared() {
 59→        super.onCleared()
 60→        dispatcher.unregister(this)
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    fun start(
 64→        site: SiteModel,
 65→        currentScreenFromSavedState: PrepublishingScreen?
 66→    ) {
 67→        if (isStarted) return
 68→        isStarted = true
 69→
 70→        this.site = site
 71→        this.currentScreen = currentScreenFromSavedState ?: HOME
 72→
 73→        currentScreen?.let { screen ->
 74→            navigateToScreen(screen)
 75→        }
 76→        fetchTags()
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun navigateToScreen(prepublishingScreen: PrepublishingScreen, bundle: Bundle? = null) {
 80→        // Note: given we know both the HOME, TAGS and ADD_CATEGORY screens have an EditText, we can ask to send the
 81→        // dismissKeyboard signal only when we're not either in one of these nor navigating towards one of these.
 82→        // At this point in code we only know where we want to navigate to, but it's ok since landing on any of these
 83→        // two we'll want the keyboard to stay up if it was already up ;) (i.e. don't dismiss it).
 84→        // For the case where this is not a story and hence there's no EditText in the HOME screen, we're ok too,
 85→        // because there wouldn't have been a keyboard up anyway.
 86→        if (prepublishingScreen == PUBLISH ||
 87→            prepublishingScreen == CATEGORIES
 88→        ) {
 89→            _dismissKeyboard.postValue(Event(Unit))
 90→        }
 91→        updateNavigationTarget(PrepublishingNavigationTarget(site, prepublishingScreen, bundle))
 92→    }
 93→
 94→    // Send this back out to the current screen and so it can determine if it needs to save
 95→    // any data before accepting a backPress - in our case, the only view that needs this today
 96→    // is the Categories selection & AddCategory
 97→    fun onDeviceBackPressed() {
 98→        if (currentScreen == CATEGORIES || currentScreen == ADD_CATEGORY) {
 99→            _triggerOnDeviceBackPressed.value = Event(currentScreen as PrepublishingScreen)
100→        } else {
101→            onBackClicked()
102→        }
103→    }
104→
105→    fun onBackClicked(bundle: Bundle? = null) {
106→        when {
107→            currentScreen == ADD_CATEGORY -> {
108→                currentScreen = CATEGORIES
109→                navigateToScreen(currentScreen as PrepublishingScreen, bundle)
110→            }
111→
112→            currentScreen != HOME -> {
113→                currentScreen = HOME
114→                navigateToScreen(currentScreen as PrepublishingScreen)
115→            }
116→
117→            else -> {
118→                _dismissBottomSheet.postValue(Event(Unit))
119→            }
120→        }
121→    }
122→
123→    fun onCloseClicked() {
124→        _dismissBottomSheet.postValue(Event(Unit))
125→    }
126→
127→    private fun updateNavigationTarget(target: PrepublishingNavigationTarget) {
128→        _navigationTarget.postValue(Event(target))
129→    }
130→
131→    fun writeToBundle(outState: Bundle) {
132→        outState.putParcelable(KEY_SCREEN_STATE, currentScreen)
133→    }
134→
135→    fun onActionClicked(actionType: ActionType, bundle: Bundle? = null) {
136→        when (actionType) {
137→            is ActionType.PrepublishingScreenNavigation -> {
138→                currentScreen = actionType.prepublishingScreen
139→                navigateToScreen(actionType.prepublishingScreen, bundle)
140→            }
141→            is ActionType.Action -> handleAction(actionType)
142→        }
143→    }
144→
145→    fun onSubmitButtonClicked(publishPost: PublishPost) {
146→        onCloseClicked()
147→        _triggerOnSubmitButtonClickedListener.postValue(Event(publishPost))
148→    }
149→
150→    private fun handleAction(action: ActionType.Action) {
151→        when (action) {
152→            ActionType.Action.NavigateToSharingSettings -> _navigateToSharingSettings.postValue(Event(site))
153→        }
154→    }
155→
156→    /**
157→     * Fetches the tags so that they will be available when the Tags action is clicked
158→     */
159→    private fun fetchTags() {
160→        dispatcher.dispatch(TaxonomyActionBuilder.newFetchTagsAction(site))
161→    }
162→
163→    @Suppress("unused")
164→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.MAIN)
165→    fun onTaxonomyChanged(event: OnTaxonomyChanged) {
166→        if (event.isError) {
167→            AppLog.e(
168→                T.POSTS,
169→                "An error occurred while updating taxonomy with type: " + event.error.type
170→            )
171→        }
172→    }
173→}

182→    ADD_CATEGORY,

184→}
